basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Women candidates and other exempted categories as per ICAR/GOI guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with at least 55% marks in Microbiology, Biotechnology, Seed Science and Technology, Agriculture, Botany, Plant Physiology or relevant basic science, ICAR/CSIR/UGC-NET or equivalent National Level JRF Eligibility Test
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Essential: Candidates who have secured at least 55% marks in master's degree OR equivalent examination from universities/institutions recognized by UGC/ICAR in Microbiology, Biotechnology, Seed Science and Technology, Agriculture, Botany, Plant Physiology or relevant basic science. ICAR/CSIR/UGC-NET or equivalent National Level JRF Eligibility Test. Desirable: Working knowledge of handling biofertilizers, microbial cultures, chromatographic techniques and data analysis. Good publication record in reputed national/international journals.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICAR IARI Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Essential: Candidates who have secured at least 55% marks in master's degree OR equivalent examination from universities/institutions recognized by UGC/ICAR in Microbiology, Biotechnology, Seed Science and Technology, Agriculture, Botany, Plant Physiology or relevant basic science. ICAR/CSIR/UGC-NET or equivalent National Level JRF Eligibility Test. Desirable: Working knowledge of handling biofertilizers, microbial cultures, chromatographic techniques and data analysis. Good publication record in reputed national/international journals.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Women candidates and other exempted categories as per ICAR/GOI guidelines.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR IARI Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 03 August 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with at least 55% marks in relevant fields like Microbiology, Biotechnology, Seed Science and Technology, Agriculture, Botany, Plant Physiology, or basic sciences, along with ICAR/CSIR/UGC-NET or equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 plus 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this position through email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line is correctly mentioned.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ICAR IARI Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ICAR IARI located?
faq.answer: The Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110012.

faq.question: Q10. What are the desirable qualifications for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include working knowledge of handling biofertilizers, microbial cultures, chromatographic techniques, data analysis, and a good publication record in reputed journals.
